assertions.assertion: Program.cs sets options.IssuerUri = 'https://identity.mycompany.com' inside the AddIdentityServer options lambda
assertions.rationale: Line 8 sets options.IssuerUri = "https://identity.mycompany.com" inside the AddIdentityServer lambda.

assertions.assertion: Program.cs loads the license key from configuration via builder.Configuration rather than hardcoding it
Program.cs calls builder.Services.AddDataProtection() with PersistKeysToDbContext or equivalent persistent storage
assertions.rationale: Lines 13-14 call AddDataProtection().PersistKeysToFileSystem() which is persistent storage, though file-based rather than DB-based.

assertions.assertion: Program.cs calls SetApplicationName on the data protection builder to prevent key isolation across instances
assertions.rationale: The data protection configuration only calls PersistKeysToFileSystem — SetApplicationName is not called.
